programs.title: Counting Cars
programs.desc: Danny is overjoyed as he gets his hands on a Plymouth Road Runner, which turns into a nightmare for Kevin. Soon, he tries to shut it down, but Danny pulls a fast one on Kevin.

programs.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programs.desc: The relentless escape attempts of Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, from French Guiana give birth to many inspirations in Hollywood.

programs.title: Nature Gone Wild
programs.desc: A paraglider becomes an unwitting passenger of a sudden and powerful storm. Meanwhile, a group of trekkers in the Himalayas finds themselves engulfed by an avalanche.

programs.title: The Einstein Challenge
programs.desc: Two historians go head to head in explaining revolutionary inventions. These include innovations ranging from dynamite to the telephone.

programs.title: Kings of Restoration
programs.desc: Mark Bassett brings in a late 1800s railroad hand-car. Can Rick's skill transform this rusty wreck into a museum-quality marvel?

programs.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programs.desc: Competitors that include a military veteran and martial artists put their custom knives to the test. Their arsenal of blades includes a fantasy cutter, a kukri and a hand-forged longsword.
